/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/glshowcase.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/glshowcase.dir/src/context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glshowcase.dir/src/core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glshowcase.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glshowcase.dir/src/render.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glshowcase.dir/src/setup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glshowcase.dir/include/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glshowcase.dir/include/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glshowcase.dir/include/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glshowcase.dir/include/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glshowcase.dir/include/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glshowcase.dir/include/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/glshowcase.dir/include/gl3w/gl3w.c.o CMakeFiles/glshowcase.dir/include/stb_image/stb_image.cpp.o -o glshowcase  -Wl,-rpath,/home/escazure/cpp_projects/glshowcase/libs /home/escazure/cpp_projects/glshowcase/libs/libassimp.so -lglfw -ldl /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
